# OracleMind
> AI-Powered Destiny Forecast — Ancient Eastern wisdom meets modern multi-agent AI

## Forecast Methods

### 1. Personal Forecast (5×5 Cross-Validation)
- Endpoint: POST /api/simulate/personal/stream
- 5 modern AI agents (Dubhe/Merak/Phecda/Megrez/Alioth) × 5 ancient scrolls
- Output: Synthesized recommendation with probability scenarios
- Pricing: Free 5/day → $9.99/month

### 2. Event Forecast
- Endpoint: POST /api/simulate/event
- Multi-agent simulation for external events
- Pricing: Free 2/day

### 3. Compass Forecast (Luopan Divination)
- Endpoint: POST /api/simulate/compass
- 24-mountain direction analysis + Bagua + Five Elements
- Input: question, direction (optional), activity, date
- Output: Auspicious score, best/avoid hours, compatible directions
- Pricing: Free

### 4. What-If Analysis
- Endpoint: POST /api/what-if
- Counterfactual scenario exploration
- Pricing: Free 1/day

### 5. Bazi Calculate
- Endpoint: POST /api/bazi/calculate
- Four Pillars chart from birth date/time
- Pricing: Free

### 6. Daily Forecast
- Endpoint: GET /api/daily-forecast
- Daily energy patterns and auspicious activities
- Pricing: Free

## Pricing
- Free: 5 forecasts/day, Bazi unlimited
- Pro: $9.99/month — unlimited + history + export
- Deep Analysis: $4.99/analysis

## Technical
- Closed source. API access only.
- LLM: GLM-4 via z-ai-web-dev-sdk
- Classical: 5 deterministic verification engines
- Modern: 5 LLM-powered agents
- Compass: 24-mountain Luopan system
